message:
Fix cache clearing, session state, key corruption, animation consistency (#4993)

- Clear sessionStorage snapshots (kcc:*) during mode transitions, single-key
  clear, and clearAllCaches to prevent stale data rehydration (#4967, #4969, #4970)
- Expose error message to callers on fetch failure instead of setting null (#4968)
- Re-read localStorage when useLocalPreference key changes at runtime (#4971)
- Await IndexedDB transaction completion in clearAllStorage (#4972)
- Verified all RefreshCw icons: animate-spin is already correctly tied to
  loading state throughout the codebase; remaining instances are decorative
  status icons or one-shot action buttons (#4974)

Fixes #4967, #4968, #4969, #4970, #4971, #4972, #4974

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
